hero.headline: LPU Online MBA in Human Resource Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: Lovely Professional University's UGC-DEB approved online MBA with a Human Resource Management specialisation. NIRF #31 University, NAAC A+. Rs 2,00,000 standard fee, Rs 1,61,600 with 20% Student Grant. Zero-cost 24-month EMI at Rs 6,733/month. Labour Laws, Organisation Development, Performance Management, Compensation Management, and Strategic HRM in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: LPU Online MBA HRM: NIRF #31, NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, Rs 2L standard or Rs 1.61L with 20% grant, zero-cost 24-month EMI. HR depth with Labour Laws, Organisation Development, Performance Management, Compensation and Benefits, Strategic HRM, and HR Analytics. Strong for HR generalist, HR business partner, and talent management careers.

about.body:
The LPU Online MBA in Human Resource Management is offered by Lovely Professional University's online division. LPU holds NAAC A+ accreditation, NIRF #31 University ranking (2025), and NIRF #44 in Management. The online programme is UGC-DEB approved.

The HRM specialisation delivers dedicated Sem 3-4 subjects covering Labour Laws and Industrial Relations, Organisation Development and Change, Performance Management Systems, Compensation and Benefits Management, Strategic Human Resource Management, and HR Analytics. These subjects cover the full HR function from compliance and industrial relations to strategic talent management.

LPU's large campus alumni network across IT services, manufacturing, and BPO companies provides placement connect for HR professionals targeting North India careers. The zero-cost EMI makes this the most accessible NIRF-ranked HR MBA in the market.

sem3Subjects.name: Labour Laws and Industrial Relations
sem3Subjects.description: Apply Indian labour legislation: Industrial Disputes Act, Contract Labour Act, POSH compliance, and collective bargaining.

sem3Subjects.name: Organisation Development and Change
sem3Subjects.description: Design OD interventions, manage culture transformation, and lead large-scale organisational change programmes.

sem3Subjects.name: Performance Management Systems
sem3Subjects.description: Build KPI frameworks, design appraisal cycles, calibrate bell curves, and manage continuous performance feedback systems.

sem3Subjects.name: Corporate Strategy and Entrepreneurship
sem3Subjects.description: Apply strategic HR planning to business growth, workforce planning, and HR-led business partnership models.

sem3Subjects.name: Generic Elective I
sem3Subjects.description: Elective subject from the GE basket chosen by the student to complement the HRM specialisation.

sem3Subjects.name: Seminar on Summer Training
sem3Subjects.description: Present summer training project findings to faculty panel, developing professional communication and analytical skills.

sem4Subjects.name: Capstone Project
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied HR research project on talent management, OD intervention, or compensation benchmarking.

sem4Subjects.name: Compensation and Benefits Management
sem4Subjects.description: Design CTC structures, manage pay bands, implement variable pay programmes, and conduct compensation surveys.

sem4Subjects.name: Strategic Human Resource Management
sem4Subjects.description: Align HR strategy with business objectives, manage workforce planning, and lead talent pipeline development.

sem4Subjects.name: HR Analytics
sem4Subjects.description: Apply people analytics, attrition prediction models, workforce productivity dashboards, and HR data visualisation.

sem4Subjects.name: Generic Elective II
sem4Subjects.description: Elective subject from the GE basket chosen by the student to complement the HRM specialisation.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all LPU Online MBA specialisations. See the main LPU Online MBA page for core subject list.

whoHires.body:
Human Resource Management MBA graduates from LPU Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** IT services and BPO, Manufacturing, FMCG, Banking and BFSI, Consulting firms, Staffing and recruitment

**Entry-level roles:** HR Executive, Talent Acquisition Executive, Learning and Development Coordinator, HR Generalist, Compensation Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** HR Business Partner, Talent Acquisition Manager, HR Manager, Compensation and Benefits Manager, L&D Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** HR Director, CHRO, Head of Talent Management, VP HR, Head of People Operations

**Top hiring organisations:** Infosys, TCS, Wipro, HCL Technologies, Cognizant, IBM India, Amazon India, Deloitte, KPMG, HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finserv, Aditya Birla Group, ManpowerGroup, Randstad India

skills.body:
The LPU HRM specialisation builds skills that HR employers test at HR business partner and HR manager levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Labour Laws and Industrial Relations: Industrial Disputes Act compliance, POSH implementation, contract labour management, and collective bargaining for HR compliance and IR roles
- Performance Management Systems: KPI framework design, appraisal calibration, bell curve management, and continuous feedback tool implementation for HR generalist and HRBP roles
- Compensation and Benefits Management: CTC structuring, pay band design, variable pay programme management, and compensation benchmarking for compensation and benefits roles
- HR Analytics: attrition prediction, workforce productivity dashboards, people data analysis, and HR metrics reporting for HR analytics and people operations roles

**Applied skills:**
- Organisation Development and Change: OD intervention design, change management programme leadership, and culture transformation management
- Strategic Human Resource Management: workforce planning, talent pipeline development, and HR-business alignment for senior HR roles

**Soft skills:** Conducting salary negotiations with senior candidates, presenting workforce analytics to the CHRO, managing employee grievance processes, and leading performance improvement plan discussions.

comparisons.body:
Comparing LPU Online MBA HRM against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA HRM:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 at Rs 2,25,000. Amity HRM is a strong all-India brand recognised in Delhi-NCR corporate HR hiring. LPU HRM at Rs 1,61,600 with grant is significantly more affordable. LPU offers zero-cost EMI; Amity does not. For North India IT services and manufacturing HR careers on a tighter budget, LPU HRM offers a clear fee advantage.

**vs MUJ Online MBA HRM:** MUJ is NAAC A+ and NIRF #58 at Rs 1,53,000-1,80,000. MUJ HRM includes Coursera Plus integration with global HR certifications. LPU HRM includes dedicated HR Analytics as a Sem 4 subject. Both are comparable in fee and subject coverage. For analytics-oriented HR careers, LPU's dedicated HR Analytics subject is an advantage.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA HRM:** NMIMS carries strong Mumbai brand recognition in HR and people management. NMIMS HRM is Rs 1,60,000-1,95,000. For Mumbai BFSI and corporate HR roles, NMIMS carries stronger brand recognition. For North India IT services and manufacturing HR careers, LPU HRM at comparable fees is a strong alternative.

fees.body:
The LPU Online MBA in Human Resource Management offers 2 fee tracks:

**Track 1 - Standard Fee**:
- Registration fee: Rs 1,000 (one-time)
- Total program fee: Rs 2,00,000
- Semester fee: Rs 50,000 per semester across 4 semesters

**Track 2 - With 20% Student Grant**:
- Registration fee: Rs 1,000 (one-time)
- Total program fee: Rs 1,61,600 after 20% Student Grant
- Semester fee: Rs 40,400 per semester

**Zero-Cost EMI option (Track 2)**:
- 24-month zero-cost EMI: Rs 6,733 per month
- No interest charged. No processing fee from the university.
- EMI is routed through the university's marketing partner.

The 20% Student Grant is applied at admission. Confirm current grant eligibility and applicable conditions with our counsellor before applying.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with LPU each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees and grant eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Lovely Professional University (LPU) and carries the LPU name with the MBA designation. The Human Resource Management specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from LPU Online MBA HRM alumni. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Gurpreet Kaur
items.liked: Labour Laws and HR Analytics subjects were directly applicable to my HR compliance and people analytics role. Zero-cost EMI was the deciding factor.
items.disliked: Organisation Development cases could include more recent examples from IT services environments.
items.body: I had 4 years in HR operations and the LPU HRM MBA helped me move to HRBP level. The Rs 1.61L fee with zero-cost EMI was unbeatable. LPU brand is well recognised at Punjab and Chandigarh IT services companies.

items.name: Vikash Kumar
items.liked: Performance Management Systems and Compensation and Benefits Management were well-structured and directly applicable. Strong practical orientation.
items.disliked: Live session faculty engagement was variable across subjects.
items.body: Good programme for HR career advancement. Delhi-NCR companies recognised the LPU credential. The HR Analytics subject gave me an edge in interviews at data-driven HR roles. Zero-cost EMI is a genuine benefit.

items.name: Anjali Mehra
items.liked: Strategic HRM and Labour Laws subjects were excellent. Strong for HR business partner roles.
items.disliked: Placement support for senior HR roles was limited. Self-initiated outreach necessary.
items.body: Solid credential at a very competitive price. For Chandigarh and North India HR careers, LPU is a recognised and affordable option. The zero-cost EMI made it a clear choice over more expensive alternatives.

faqs.question: How does the LPU 20% Student Grant work?
faqs.answer: The 20% Student Grant reduces the standard Rs 2,00,000 fee to Rs 1,61,600. It is applied at admission. Confirm current grant eligibility conditions with our counsellor before applying, as grant availability may vary by intake cycle.

faqs.question: Is LPU Online MBA zero-cost EMI genuinely interest-free?
faqs.answer: Yes. The 24-month zero-cost EMI at Rs 6,733 per month carries no interest charge and no processing fee from the university. It is routed through the university's marketing partner. Confirm current EMI terms before committing.

faqs.question: Does LPU HRM MBA cover HR Analytics?
faqs.answer: Yes. HR Analytics is a dedicated Sem 4 subject covering people analytics, attrition prediction modelling, workforce productivity dashboards, and HR data visualisation. This makes LPU HRM directly applicable to data-driven HR and people operations roles.

faqs.question: Is LPU HRM MBA suitable for HR professionals in IT companies?
faqs.answer: Yes. Labour Laws, Performance Management Systems, Compensation and Benefits, and HR Analytics are all directly applicable to IT services HR roles. LPU's strong alumni base in Punjabi IT services companies and North India IT clusters supports placement for IT sector HR careers.

faqs.question: Is LPU Online MBA NIRF ranked?
faqs.answer: Yes. Lovely Professional University is ranked NIRF #31 (University category, 2025) and NIRF #44 in the Management category. This places LPU among the top-ranked universities offering UGC-DEB approved online MBAs in India.

chooseIf: You want a UGC-DEB approved MBA from a NIRF #31 university at Rs 1,61,600 (with grant) or Rs 2,00,000 standard.
You want 24-month zero-cost EMI at Rs 6,733 per month and are targeting HR business partner or HR manager roles.
You want dedicated HR Analytics coverage alongside Labour Laws and Performance Management for data-driven HR careers.
consider: If Mumbai corporate HR or BFSI brand recognition matters, NMIMS Online MBA HRM carries stronger recognition in those markets.
If Manipal brand with Coursera Plus HR certifications is preferred, MUJ Online MBA HRM is available at comparable fees.
If pan-India corporate HR brand recognition is the priority, Amity Online MBA HRM at Rs 2.25L offers strong all-India recognition.
